NKJV.1: The LORD reigns; Let the peoples tremble! He dwells between the cherubim; Let the earth be moved!
NKJV.2: The LORD is great in Zion, And He is high above all the peoples.
NKJV.3: Let them praise Your great and awesome name— He is holy.
NKJV.4: The King’s strength also loves justice; You have established equity; You have executed justice and righteousness in Jacob.
NKJV.5: Exalt the LORD our God, And worship at His footstool— He is holy.
NKJV.6: Moses and Aaron were among His priests, And Samuel was among those who called upon His name; They called upon the LORD, and He answered them.
NKJV.7: He spoke to them in the cloudy pillar; They kept His testimonies and the ordinance He gave them.
NKJV.8: You answered them, O LORD our God; You were to them God-Who-Forgives, Though You took vengeance on their deeds.
NKJV.9: Exalt the LORD our God, And worship at His holy hill; For the LORD our God is holy.

ESV.1: The LORD reigns; let the peoples tremble! He sits enthroned upon the cherubim; let the earth quake!
ESV.2: The LORD is great in Zion; he is exalted over all the peoples.
ESV.3: Let them praise your great and awesome name! Holy is he!
ESV.4: The King in his might loves justice.  You have established equity; you have executed justice and righteousness in Jacob.
ESV.5: Exalt the LORD our God; worship at his footstool! Holy is he!
ESV.6: Moses and Aaron were among his priests, Samuel also was among those who called upon his name. They called to the LORD, and he answered them.
ESV.7: In the pillar of the cloud he spoke to them; they kept his testimonies and the statute that he gave them.
ESV.8: O LORD our God, you answered them; you were a forgiving God to them, but an avenger of their wrongdoings.
ESV.9: Exalt the LORD our God, and worship at his holy mountain; for the LORD our God is holy!

NASB.1: The LORD reigns, let the peoples tremble; He is enthroned [above] the cherubim, let the earth shake!
NASB.2: The LORD is great in Zion, And He is exalted above all the peoples.
NASB.3: Let them praise Your great and awesome name; Holy is He.
NASB.4: The strength of the King loves justice; You have established equity; You have executed justice and righteousness in Jacob.
NASB.5: Exalt the LORD our God And worship at His footstool; Holy is He.
NASB.6: Moses and Aaron were among His priests, And Samuel was among those who called on His name; They called upon the LORD and He answered them.
NASB.7: He spoke to them in the pillar of cloud; They kept His testimonies And the statute that He gave them.
NASB.8: O LORD our God, You answered them; You were a forgiving God to them, And [yet] an avenger of their [evil] deeds.
NASB.9: Exalt the LORD our God And worship at His holy hill, For holy is the LORD our God.

NLT.1:
The LORD is king!
Let the nations tremble!
He sits on his throne between the cherubim.
Let the whole earth quake!
NLT.2:
The LORD sits in majesty in Jerusalem,
exalted above all the nations.
NLT.3:
Let them praise your great and awesome name.
Your name is holy!
NLT.4:
Mighty King, lover of justice,
you have established fairness.
You have acted with justice
and righteousness throughout Israel.
NLT.5:
Exalt the LORD our God!
Bow low before his feet, for he is holy!
NLT.6:
Moses and Aaron were among his priests;
Samuel also called on his name.
They cried to the LORD for help,
and he answered them.
NLT.7:
He spoke to Israel from the pillar of cloud,
and they followed the laws and decrees he gave them.
NLT.8:
O LORD our God, you answered them.
You were a forgiving God to them,
but you punished them when they went wrong.
NLT.9:
Exalt the LORD our God,
and worship at his holy mountain in Jerusalem,
for the LORD our God is holy!

WEB.1: Yahweh reigns! Let the peoples tremble. He sits enthroned among the cherubim. Let the earth be moved.
WEB.2: Yahweh is great in Zion. He is high above all the peoples.
WEB.3: Let them praise your great and awesome name. He is Holy!
WEB.4: The King’s strength also loves justice. You do establish equity. You execute justice and righteousness in Jacob.
WEB.5: Exalt Yahweh our God. Worship at his footstool. He is Holy!
WEB.6: Moses and Aaron were among his priests, Samuel among those who call on his name; they called on Yahweh, and he answered them.
WEB.7: He spoke to them in the pillar of cloud. They kept his testimonies, the statute that he gave them.
WEB.8: You answered them, Yahweh our God. You are a God who forgave them, although you took vengeance for their doings.
WEB.9: Exalt Yahweh, our God. Worship at his holy hill, for Yahweh, our God, is holy!

AMP.1:
The LORD reigns, let the peoples tremble [with submissive wonder]!
He sits enthroned above the cherubim, let the earth shake!
AMP.2:
The LORD is great in Zion,
And He is exalted and magnified above all the peoples.
AMP.3:
Let them [reverently] praise Your great and awesome name;
Holy is He.
AMP.4:
The strength of the King loves justice and righteous judgment;
You have established fairness;
You have executed justice and righteousness in Jacob (Israel).
AMP.5:
Exalt the LORD our God
And worship at His footstool;
Holy is He.
AMP.6:
Moses and Aaron were among His priests,
And Samuel was among those who called on His name;
They called upon the LORD and He answered them.
AMP.7:
He spoke to them in the pillar of cloud;
They kept His testimonies
And the statutes that He gave them.
AMP.8:
You answered them, O LORD our God;
You were a forgiving God to them,
And yet an avenger of their evil practices.
AMP.9:
Exalt the LORD our God
And worship at His holy hill [Zion, the temple mount],
For the LORD our God is holy.

MSG.1:
God rules. On your toes, everybody!
He rules from his angel throne—take notice!
MSG.2:
God looms majestic in Zion,
He towers in splendor over all the big names.
MSG.3:
Great and terrible your beauty: let everyone praise you!
Holy. Yes, holy.
MSG.4:
Strong King, lover of justice,
You laid things out fair and square;
You set down the foundations in Jacob,
Foundation stones of just and right ways.
MSG.5:
Honor God, our God; worship his rule!
Holy. Yes, holy.
MSG.6:
Moses and Aaron were his priests,
Samuel among those who prayed to him.
They prayed to God and he answered them;
MSG.7:
He spoke from the pillar of cloud.
And they did what he said; they kept the law he gave them.
MSG.8:
And then God, our God, answered them
(But you were never soft on their sins).
MSG.9:
Lift high God, our God; worship at his holy mountain.
Holy. Yes, holy is God our God.

NIV.1:
Psalm 99
The Lord reigns,
let the nations tremble;
he sits enthroned between the cherubim,
let the earth shake.
NIV.2:
Great is the Lord in Zion;
he is exalted over all the nations.
NIV.3:
Let them praise your great and awesome name—
he is holy.
NIV.4:
The King is mighty, he loves justice—
you have established equity;
in Jacob you have done
what is just and right.
NIV.5:
Exalt the Lord our God
and worship at his footstool;
he is holy.
NIV.6:
Moses and Aaron were among his priests,
Samuel was among those who called on his name;
they called on the Lord
and he answered them.
NIV.7:
He spoke to them from the pillar of cloud;
they kept his statutes and the decrees he gave them.
NIV.8:
O Lord our God,
you answered them;
you were to Israel a forgiving God,
though you punished their misdeeds.
NIV.9:
Exalt the Lord our God
and worship at his holy mountain,
for the Lord our God is holy.

NRSVCE.1:
The LORD is king; let the peoples tremble!
He sits enthroned upon the cherubim; let the earth quake!
NRSVCE.2:
The LORD is great in Zion;
he is exalted over all the peoples.
NRSVCE.3:
Let them praise your great and awesome name.
Holy is he!
NRSVCE.4:
Mighty King, lover of justice,
you have established equity;
you have executed justice
and righteousness in Jacob.
NRSVCE.5:
Extol the LORD our God;
worship at his footstool.
Holy is he!
NRSVCE.6:
Moses and Aaron were among his priests,
Samuel also was among those who called on his name.
They cried to the LORD, and he answered them.
NRSVCE.7:
He spoke to them in the pillar of cloud;
they kept his decrees,
and the statutes that he gave them.
NRSVCE.8:
O LORD our God, you answered them;
you were a forgiving God to them,
but an avenger of their wrongdoings.
NRSVCE.9:
Extol the LORD our God,
and worship at his holy mountain;
for the LORD our God is holy.

NET.1: The LORD reigns! The nations tremble. He sits enthroned above the winged angels; the earth shakes.
NET.2: The LORD is elevated in Zion; he is exalted over all the nations.
NET.3: Let them praise your great and awesome name! He is holy!
NET.4: The king is strong; he loves justice. You ensure that legal decisions will be made fairly; you promote justice and equity in Jacob.
NET.5: Praise the LORD our God! Worship before his footstool! He is holy!
NET.6: Moses and Aaron were among his priests; Samuel was one of those who prayed to him. They prayed to the LORD and he answered them.
NET.7: He spoke to them from a pillar of cloud; they obeyed his regulations and the ordinance he gave them.
NET.8: O LORD our God, you answered them. They found you to be a forgiving God, but also one who punished their sinful deeds.
NET.9: Praise the LORD our God! Worship on his holy hill, for the LORD our God is holy!
